description: Replete with a rugged heel and seamless mesh, this well cushioned adiSTAR Ride 3 running shoe for men weighs just about 358 grams, making it a great hit with serious runners. This plush, high milage trainer works best for neutral runners, offering ultimate comfort and smooth ride every mile. UpperSeamless synthetic double mesh upper and tongue for maximum ventilation and protection from abrasion and blisteringStitched-on microsuede for smooth forefoot Fit and supportSynthetic leather overlays for added shoe structure and midfoot supportAdded synthetic overl;ays around sockliner and backfoot for enhanced support to the footThree striped overlays on sides representing the brand's motto of perseverence and performanceSynthetic laces for snug fit and durabilityAsymmetrical lace up system for protection from abrasionPadded tongue for comfortadidas logo on tongue to create a fashion statementCushioned sockliner for in step comfort and to lock the backfoot in placeSynthetic overlay at upper heel cup for enhanced durabilityMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and durabilityLightly padded footbed for impact protection and comfortGEOFIT+ for anatomical fit and comfortFitFOAM midsole made of a visco-elastic rebound foam to adapt to the shape of your foot like a customised mouldOutsoleMade of durable blown rubber for ehanced durability and cushioningForefoot and heel separated for enhanced traction and support, and connected with a plastic shank for better torsionabilityReinforced toe guard on the upper for forefoot protectionFORMOTION technology for better adaptability to the ground, ensuring a smoother runadiPRENE+ technology employed in the forefoot for enhanced propulsion and efficiencyTORSION SYSTEM in the foot arch for midfoot integrityadiPRENE technology under the heel for superior cushioning and impact protectionadiLITE lasting for superior comfort and lightweight feeladiWEAR outsole for enhanced durabilityWash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
